narrative:
New Franklin 3-B (precinct in Summit County) has 855 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
